title: Form submission fails with 'Problem submitting response'
symptom: When attempting to submit a form using the n8n form trigger node, the user receives a message stating 'Problem submitting response'. This occurs consistently during submissions.
not_this_if: Form submission works in n8n Cloud or other environments
root_cause: The error indicates a potential configuration issue with the Hostinger VPS setup, possibly related to file upload limits or server settings that affect form submissions. It may also be caused by browser-related issues or network problems.
fix_steps: Test the form submission without file uploads to isolate the issue.
If it works without files, check the VPS configuration for file size limits.
Try uploading a smaller image file to see if the issue persists.
Use browser Developer Tools to check for errors in the console and network tabs.
agent_instruction: Follow the troubleshooting steps to identify and resolve the form submission issue.
